titleStmt.title: SII 30.25: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 25. (A.R. No. 102 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha temple-on the south wall of the same maṇḍapa Kulōttuṅga-Chōḻa: year 3: 1152 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. This inscription registers a gift of paddy for feeding mendicants (tapasvins) probably by Agōrasivaṉ from the lands irrigated by the big dam (periya aṇai). The quantity of rice to be given each day to each person is specified and provision was also made for the years containing an extra month (adhika-māsa).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅka coḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu Āṉittiṅkaḷ l viya
pperiyaaṇaiyil viḷaiñca pokattil Iṟainellil kāṇam patinkala nel Āṇṭuva
ṭattile tapaciyar Amutu ceyya nittakkalam Oṉṟukku nāḷoṉṟukku Arici Ayvuḻakkukkum
ṉorukalaṉe Irutūṇip patikkuRead- patakkunāṉāḻi Uri Āḻākkukku kāṇattāl nel nāṟkalaṉe Irutūṇi mukkuṟu
pu tūṇi Āka Āṇṭoṉṟukku Atiyamācam Akappaṭa kāṇanāḻiyāṟ kaṇpuRead- kampunāṟkalattukku niṅku nel mukka
vatākavum Ippaṭi cantirātittavarai celvatāka kalveṭṭuvitteṉ Akoracivaṉeṉ Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 30.25 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
